user.title: Select your SIBIONICS CGM sensor
user.description: Choose the CGM sensor to add.

qr_code.title: Enter sensor QR code
qr_code.description:
Scan the QR code on the SIBIONICS sensor packaging and paste the full data string here.

Device: **{name}**

confirm.title: Confirm setup
confirm.description:
Ready to set up **{name}**

- Patient: **{patient_name}**
- Serial: `{serial}`
- Sensitivity input: `{sensitivity_input}`

The calibration engine will initialize on first connection.

abort.no_devices_found: No SIBIONICS CGM sensors found. Make sure the sensor is active and your phone's Bluetooth connection to it is disabled.

error.invalid_qr_code: Invalid QR code. Expected GS1 format with AI 21 serial number (e.g., containing '(21)250770QF32450CAA59').
error.qr_device_mismatch: QR code does not match the discovered sensor. The match key from the QR serial should appear in the BLE device name.
